category_sources: source_facts.description says Graphite2 is a smart font renderer for non-Roman scripts; official Graphite site describes Graphite2 as a font rendering engine.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is graphite2; official Graphite application development page uses Graphite2 for the engine implementation.
docs_sources: Official Graphite site provides the project overview, technical overview, and Graphite2 application development/API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/silnrsi/graphite, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Graphite docs describe a smart font system and Graphite2 engine for complex text layout.
